repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: Both selected memories address a redefinition error of a custom operator class (Ca6k*Custom) in autogen/op_proto.h caused by duplicate REG_OP, which is the exact symptom observed for ca6k_00322 (redefinition of 'class ge::op::Ca6k00322Custom'). They provide guidance to avoid introducing a second REG_OP or manual OP_ADD that duplicates the autogen macro. The errors are identical in nature (same error message pattern, same build stage) and originate from the same category (torch#1) and tool_mode (no_tool), making these memories directly applicable.
